description_long: This hotel complex features a modern, low-rise architectural design with multiple interconnected buildings arranged around a central courtyard and large swimming pool. The structures have flat roofs, clean lines, and a mix of light and dark exterior finishes, complemented by extensive landscaping with palm trees and green lawns. The site includes a dedicated parking area, a tennis court, and several pathways connecting the various buildings and amenities. Outdoor seating areas and terraces are visible, providing spaces for relaxation and socializing. The main entrance is marked by a driveway and a prominent building, likely the reception or lobby, with adjacent parking. The overall layout is spacious and resort-like, designed to accommodate guests in a comfortable, contemporary environment.
description: A modern, low-rise hotel complex with multiple interconnected buildings, a central pool, landscaped grounds, and amenities like parking and a tennis court. The design features flat roofs, clean lines, and extensive outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance area with a driveway, parking lot, and the prominent front building, as well as landscaped grounds and several outlying structures.
description_view_1: From this angle, the central swimming pool and surrounding buildings are most visible, along with the tennis court and a road running along one edge of the property.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the rear of the complex, with more guest buildings, green spaces, and the tennis court in the foreground.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the central pool, interconnected pathways, and the arrangement of buildings around the main courtyard, with the parking area and entrance further in the background.
